name: Udaipur
description: Our Udaipur hub combines modern legal advisory with a rich heritage, offering strategic guidance for domestic and international clients venturing into the region.

name: Ahmedabad
description: Our Ahmedabad representative hub connects clients to the fast-growing industrial and corporate landscape of Gujarat, advising on commercial transactions and regulatory matters.

name: Bangalore
description: Located in the Silicon Valley of India, our Bangalore office is perfectly positioned to serve the high-growth technology, venture capital, and private equity sectors.

name: Jaipur
description: Our Jaipur hub provides tailored legal advice for real estate, heritage hospitality, and regional corporate ventures, matching local insight with institutional standards.

name: New Delhi
description: Our New Delhi representative hub provides deep advisory capabilities in regulatory compliance, corporate governance, and government relations, advising leading startups and corporate groups in the national capital region.

name: Mumbai
description: Located in the financial capital of India, our Mumbai representative office advises leading conglomerates, financial institutions, and funds on complex corporate and finance transactions.

name: GIFT City
description: Strategically located in Gujarat International Finance Tec-City, our GIFT City hub delivers specialized regulatory counsel for cross-border financial services, investment funds, and international tax structuring.

name: Dubai
description: Our Dubai office serves as a hub for our Middle East practice, advising clients on cross-border transactions and private capital investments.
